name: PFStatusBadge
description: Compact semantic state signal for consistent status communication.

requirements: Status color may not be the only meaning carrier.
Status semantics must match Foundation status tokens.

composition_rules: Use PFStatusBadge only for standardized semantic states.
Combine with supporting text when status alone is not enough context.
anti_patterns: using status badges as decorative category tags
inventing custom statuses outside the Foundation layer
relying on color alone for meaning
